name: Italian Style Baked Zucchini
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
12 baby zucchini or 6 small zucchini, trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a small skillet, render the bacon until almost crisp. Add olive oil when nearly done; heat until shimmering. Add shallots and cook for a few minutes or until tender. Stir in oregano and prosciutto; simmer briefly. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper.
3. Halve baby zucchini lengthwise, then quarter if using small ones. Place them skin side down in an oiled gratin dish. Spoon the bacon mixture over zucchini and scatter parsley on top. Cover and bake for 20 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
